releaseNotes: v0.24.11 — Cycle-count workflow (zone-by-zone scan against FEFO; anything not scanned is depleted in-place, doesn't ship for credit). Plus two new pre-audit reports: soon-to-expire pull list (120-day horizon, sorted by expiration) and dead-stock candidates report (per-GTIN expiry rate vs PAR review). Available from the dashboard overflow menu and Reports screen.
